summary: Phase 2 SOCIAL (reactions + comments on activity feed) end-to-end tested. All 10 new backend tests pass (reactions set/replace/toggle, one-per-user, comments CRUD, admin delete, 403 for non-owner, empty rejection, cross-user notifications for both reaction+comment kinds, no self-notify, persistence). Frontend Playwright verified: /feed loads, react-btn opens picker with 7 lucide icons, selecting adds chip, replacing removes previous chip (one-per-user), clicking same chip toggles off, comment input+send posts and increments count, del-comment removes it, reload persists reaction chip (rocket), filter chips work, and regression nav to /tasks /store /leaderboard works.

issues: Service worker registration fails with SecurityError / MIME type text/html on /service-worker.js. Non-blocking for social features; may impact PWA install/offline. Pre-existing.

action_items: (Optional/non-blocking) Fix service-worker.js MIME type — endpoint returns text/html, blocking PWA registration.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~2364 lines — Phase 2 social block is well-contained but the file continues to grow; consider splitting feed/social routes into a submodule.
FeedSocial.jsx correctly clears previous reaction chip in UI because backend returns full reactions summary; good pattern.
_feed_event_owner correctly handles lvlup-/delivered-/tx- id prefixes; comment/reaction notifications correctly skip self-owner.
seed_data_creation: Transient TEST_ comments/reactions created during pytest+UI runs; all TEST_ comments cleaned up via admin DELETE endpoint after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login response uses key 'token' (not access_token). Feed event ids first item is used by parallel test workers so use events[-1] (or a specific-owner event) to avoid xdist races. Reaction & comment endpoints require Bearer token. Ukrainian labels used (Реакція, Написати коментар...). PWA service-worker MIME warning is pre-existing and unrelated.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found in Phase 2 social feature.
